name: rakshobhya-ecosystem
description: AI-Powered Menstrual Health & Women Empowerment Ecosystem Root

scripts.dev: npx -y concurrently --kill-others "npm run start --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
scripts.host:local: npm run build && npx -y concurrently --kill-others "npm run start --prefix server" "npx -y localtunnel --port 5000"
